mapper.insert: INSERT INTO challenges ( host_id, title, description, category_id, entry_fee, verification_method, cert_frequency, daily_cert_limit, success_criteria_rate, ai_review_enabled, start_date, end_date, max_participants, status, cert_start_time, cert_end_time, feed_visibility ) VALUES ( #{hostId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{entryFee}, #{verificationMethod}, #{certFrequency}, #{dailyCertLimit}, #{successCriteriaRate}, #{aiReviewEnabled}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{maxParticipants}, #{status}, #{certStartTime}, #{certEndTime}, #{feedVisibility} )
